XMLDB.COMMENT: STACK Mastery adaptive formative mastery checks

TABLE.NAME: stackmastery
TABLE.COMMENT: Instance settings for each STACK Mastery activity.

FIELD.NAME: course
FIELD.COMMENT: Course this activity belongs to.

FIELD.NAME: skills
FIELD.COMMENT: CSV of selected CORE canonical skill codes in canonical policy order (custom topics live in stackmastery_topics). Empty/null is normalised to all 8 by lib.php ONLY when the instance has no topic rows; with topics present, empty means no core skills. Nullable because XMLDB forbids CHAR NOT NULL with an empty default (fires an install-time debugging message that fails moodle-plugin-ci).

FIELD.NAME: targetmastery
FIELD.COMMENT: Scalar target mastery from the form (termination only; the policy encoding stays pinned).

FIELD.NAME: targetvector
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON object mapping every manifest skill code (the 8 core codes plus any custom topic slugs) to the per-skill target, expanded from targetmastery at save time.

FIELD.NAME: poolcategoryid
FIELD.COMMENT: Question bank category the pool is drawn from (no subcategories in v1).

FIELD.NAME: budget
FIELD.COMMENT: Maximum questions per attempt before per-attempt capping to the eligible unique count.

FIELD.NAME: maxattempts
FIELD.COMMENT: 0 = unlimited.

FIELD.NAME: grademode
FIELD.COMMENT: 0 = binary reached-target (default), 1 = mean final mastery over the selected skills.

FIELD.NAME: showprogress
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether students see per-skill mastery bars and the target line.

FIELD.NAME: epsilon
FIELD.COMMENT: Snapshot of the admin exploration rate taken at instance creation.

FIELD.NAME: timeopen
FIELD.COMMENT: Attempts allowed from this time; 0 = no restriction.

FIELD.NAME: timeclose
FIELD.COMMENT: Attempts closed after this time; 0 = no restriction.

FIELD.NAME: completionreachedtarget
FIELD.COMMENT: Custom completion rule: complete when an attempt reached the mastery target.

TABLE.NAME: stackmastery_topics
TABLE.COMMENT: Per-instance custom topics: teacher-worded skills backed by a matched forge question template. Instance-owned; no user data.

FIELD.NAME: stackmasteryid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key references stackmastery.id; rows are removed in stackmastery_delete_instance.

FIELD.NAME: sortorder
FIELD.COMMENT: 0-based creation order; the manifest's custom-code order.

FIELD.NAME: slug
FIELD.COMMENT: Derived custom skill code, [a-z0-9] max 28, unique per instance; used in question tags, the attempt skillssnapshot and the mastery JSON keys.

FIELD.NAME: label
FIELD.COMMENT: The teacher's words for the topic (the display label for this skill).

FIELD.NAME: templatetype
FIELD.COMMENT: Matched forge template type code (non-core only, e.g. set_theory).

INDEX.NAME: instanceslug
INDEX.COMMENT: A slug is a skill code; it must be unique within its instance.

TABLE.NAME: stackmastery_attempts
TABLE.COMMENT: One row per user attempt; owns the question usage (qubaid) and the live mastery state.

FIELD.NAME: stackmasteryid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key references stackmastery.id.

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key references user.id.

FIELD.NAME: attemptnumber
FIELD.COMMENT: Sequential attempt number per user per instance, 1-based.

FIELD.NAME: qubaid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key references question_usages.id (component mod_stackmastery); 0 until first provisioning. Plain foreign key: the index is deliberately NON-unique (two concurrent starters both sit at 0 transiently).

FIELD.NAME: state
FIELD.COMMENT: inprogress, complete or abandoned.

FIELD.NAME: finishreason
FIELD.COMMENT: target, budget, exhausted, user, timeclose or abandoned; null while in progress.

FIELD.NAME: inprogressuniq
FIELD.COMMENT: 0 while in progress, set to id at close. Unique (stackmasteryid,userid,inprogressuniq) enforces at most one open attempt cross-DB (XMLDB has no partial indexes; nullable unique breaks on sqlsrv).

FIELD.NAME: currentslot
FIELD.COMMENT: The open (asked, not yet graded) usage slot; 0 = none (SLOTLESS). Resume re-renders this slot instead of drawing.

FIELD.NAME: pendingjson
FIELD.COMMENT: Frozen selection context of the open slot: seq, slot, qbe, questionid, version, variant, stackseed, recommended and served action, source, propensity, epsilon, eligible count, mastery before.

FIELD.NAME: preview
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 for staff trial attempts; always 0 in v1 (no teacher preview). Excluded from the training export, included in privacy.

FIELD.NAME: masterycurrent
FIELD.COMMENT: Live mastery vector, JSON object keyed by every skill code of the attempt's manifest (the 8 core codes plus any custom topic slugs).

FIELD.NAME: skillssnapshot
FIELD.COMMENT: Selected-skills CSV frozen at attempt start: selected core codes in canonical order, then custom topic slugs in sortorder (text because 8 codes plus 12 slugs can exceed 255).

FIELD.NAME: targetsnapshot
FIELD.COMMENT: Per-skill target vector JSON frozen at attempt start.

FIELD.NAME: budget
FIELD.COMMENT: Effective budget for this attempt = min(instance budget, distinct eligible questions at freeze).

FIELD.NAME: questionsdone
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of graded answers so far (equals the step count).

FIELD.NAME: reachedtarget
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 when every selected skill reached its target during this attempt.

FIELD.NAME: stepstotarget
FIELD.COMMENT: seq of the step on which all selected skills first reached target; null if never.

FIELD.NAME: timetargetreached
FIELD.COMMENT: Stamped at the crossing step; null if never.

FIELD.NAME: masteryfinal
FIELD.COMMENT: Final mastery vector JSON, set when the attempt closes.

FIELD.NAME: policyversion
FIELD.COMMENT: Version id of the policy in force at attempt start.

FIELD.NAME: bktmodelversion
FIELD.COMMENT: Version id of the BKT parameter set in force at attempt start.

FIELD.NAME: timeexported
FIELD.COMMENT: 0 = steps not yet included in an experience export.

FIELD.NAME: timefinish
FIELD.COMMENT: 0 until the attempt closes.

INDEX.NAME: instuseropen
INDEX.COMMENT: At most one in-progress attempt per instance and user.

INDEX.NAME: statetimemodified
INDEX.COMMENT: Abandon scan of the cleanup task.

TABLE.NAME: stackmastery_steps
TABLE.COMMENT: The experience log: one row per answered question, a complete off-policy RL experience with provenance.

FIELD.NAME: attemptid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key references stackmastery_attempts.id. Deliberately no userid: user linkage only via the attempt (pseudonymisation by construction).

FIELD.NAME: seq
FIELD.COMMENT: 1-based step order within the attempt.

FIELD.NAME: slot
FIELD.COMMENT: Question usage slot this step was answered in.

FIELD.NAME: questionid
FIELD.COMMENT: Concrete question (version row) served; denormalised for self-contained export.

FIELD.NAME: variant
FIELD.COMMENT: The question engine variant number served.

FIELD.NAME: stackseed
FIELD.COMMENT: The resolved STACK deployed seed; null for non-randomised or non-STACK questions.

FIELD.NAME: recommendedskill
FIELD.COMMENT: What the policy (or its masked lookup) recommended, even when exploration overrode it.

FIELD.NAME: servedskill
FIELD.COMMENT: What was actually served.

FIELD.NAME: actionsource
FIELD.COMMENT: policy, explore, fallback, exhausted or heuristic.

FIELD.NAME: propensity
FIELD.COMMENT: Probability of the served action under the logging policy (epsilon-mixture aware).

FIELD.NAME: masterybefore
FIELD.COMMENT: Mastery vector JSON object keyed by the attempt manifest's skill codes, before the update.

FIELD.NAME: correct
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 iff fraction is at least 0.999 (v1 BKT correctness mapping).

FIELD.NAME: fraction
FIELD.COMMENT: Raw graded fraction from the question engine (nullable, mirrors question_attempt_steps.fraction); logged for future partial-credit BKT.

FIELD.NAME: masteryafter
FIELD.COMMENT: Mastery vector JSON object keyed by the attempt manifest's skill codes, after the update.

FIELD.NAME: stateencodingversion
FIELD.COMMENT: State encoding id in force when logged: enc-1 (core tabular packing) or enc-custom-1 (manifest-keyed, no positional packing).

FIELD.NAME: rewardversion
FIELD.COMMENT: Reward-spec version in force when logged; the shaped reward itself is deliberately NOT stored (recomputed offline).

TABLE.NAME: stackmastery_pool_snapshot
TABLE.COMMENT: Attempt-start freeze of eligible question versions: one row per (attempt, skill, difficulty, question bank entry).

FIELD.NAME: attemptid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key references stackmastery_attempts.id. Rows are deleted when the attempt reaches a terminal state.

FIELD.NAME: skill
FIELD.COMMENT: Canonical skill code of the cell.

FIELD.NAME: difficulty
FIELD.COMMENT: easy, medium or hard.

FIELD.NAME: questionid
FIELD.COMMENT: The pinned question version row id.

FIELD.NAME: timeserved
FIELD.COMMENT: Null until the question is served in this attempt (repeats disallowed in v1).

FIELD.NAME: invalid
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 when the pinned version could not be started (question deleted mid-attempt).

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: Freeze time; the orphan sweep age guard.

TABLE.NAME: stackmastery_exportruns
TABLE.COMMENT: Experience export runs: file provenance for offline retraining.
